stable_visual_summary: Zad is a large, imposing figure characterized by a hulking and powerful physique. He possesses a brute-like physical presence.
personality: Despite his intimidating physical presence, he lacks a reputation for lethality among his own people, having never made a kill among his chieftains.
relationship_notes: Seen in deep conversation with Sarkoja.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain a large, powerful physical presence.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific combat prowess or temperament beyond his physical size.
Exact social standing within the chieftain hierarchy.
